sources.videoTitle: *BUFFED* Mega Garchomp is DOMINANT in Mega Masters! 2696 ELO!! | Pokemon GO PvP
sources.author: HomeSliceHenry

description: Mega Garchomp lead that banks energy and pivots into Zacian as the safe swap, with Xerneas as the closer in the back. Garchomp leverages its buffed legacy Earth Power (now 50 energy) for fast, hard-hitting damage and Twister baits, while the two fairies clean up dragons in the back.
performanceNotes: Went 9-1 live on stream up to 2696 ELO
Buffed Earth Power gives Garchomp much faster pacing and brutal neutral/super-effective damage
Garchomp's bulk lets it pressure shields from megas like Rayquaza while the fairy back line cleans up
Buffed Dragon Ascent fires off extremely fast and deals absurd damage, even through resists like Mega Metagross
Won repeatedly even from negative leads; only Mega Metagross is called a corebreaker for the team
Zacian closes games hard with Close Combat against Lugia, Pulkia, and Zekrom

sources.videoTitle: *BUFFED* Mega Rayquaza is ABSURD in the Mega Master League! | Pokémon GO Battle League
sources.author: HomeSliceHenry

description: Mega Rayquaza lead with a Lunala safe swap and Zacian in the back. Rayquaza abuses the buffed Dragon Ascent (110 power / 45 energy) for fast, massive damage, Lunala pivots in for Spatial Rend/Lugia coverage with Shadow Ball, and Zacian cleans up with Close Combat and Behemoth Blade.

Palkia lead with Mega Mewtwo Y as the featured mega safe-swap and Zacian Crowned Sword as the closer. Mega Mewtwo Y runs Thunderbolt over its legacy Shadow Ball to hammer Mega Gyarados, Kyogre, and Yveltal, while spamming Psystrike for huge neutral damage.
performanceNotes: Mega Mewtwo Y's massive 7000+ CP stat product lets Psystrike pick up multi-KO sweeps even on resisted hits
Thunderbolt one-shots Yveltal and answers Kyogre/Gyarados matchups Shadow Ball couldn't
Mega Mewtwo Y wins charge attack priority (CMP) over Zacian in the mirror

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: *HUNDO* MEGA MEWTWO Y has arrived in the Mega Master League! | Pokemon GO Battle League
